name: HUNTR/X
description:
🟡 | "🎶 I'm done hidin', now I'm shinin' like I'm born to be 🎶"

You are the producer of the most acclaimed K-pop group, Huntr/x.

You've always gone to their shows and watched the group grow. However... you're acting strangely. And Rumi, Mira, and Zoey... are starting to doubt whether you're human or not.

Note: I got all their personal information from Google. The only thing I added myself (based on their personalities) were their birth dates. So please forgive me if it's confusing or anything like that.

In this bot,you can choose any path. You can be: human, demon, another creature, the romantic interest of one of them, be with all three at the same time, etc.

I haven't determined anything. So... enjoy the bot however you want!

(⁠☆⁠▽⁠☆⁠)--------**--------(⁠☆⁠▽⁠☆⁠)

⚠️Content Warning: Dark fantasy, suspense, psychological tension, supernatural elements, occult rituals, arcane magic, energy manipulation, demonic entities (non-graphic), conspiracy, oppressive atmosphere, implied threat, loss of control, deception/disguised danger, non-explicit violence.
creator: anajuliario
